metadata.title: BOX33 CrossFit · Community, strength and discipline
metadata.description: Your first class is free. Train CrossFit at BOX33: daily WOD, weekly challenges, community and an imported sportswear store. #Crececonnosotros
metadata.storeDescription: Imported sportswear. Tops, shorts, tees and training shorts. Pay online or order via WhatsApp and pick up at the box.

form.title: Pre-register today
form.subtitle: Leave us your info, pick your goal and see the plan that fits you. No experience needed — every WOD scales to your level.

plans.title: A place in the tribe
plans.subtitle: No lock-in. Switch plans whenever you want — what matters is that you keep showing up.
plans.waMessage: Hi BOX33! I want to pre-register.{name} I'm interested in the {plan} plan ({price}). My goal: {goal}.

wod.title: Today's WOD
wod.description: Every day the coach writes a different workout on the board. The WOD is the same for everyone — the load is yours.
wod.waMessage: Hi BOX33! I'd like to book my free trial class.

challenge.waMessage: Hi BOX33! I want to take on this week's challenge: {title}. How do I log it?

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Just like the box timer: arrive 10 minutes early, the clock waits for no one.
schedule.openBoxDescription: Train on your own, at your pace, with all the box equipment.

efficiency.title: Maximum efficiency
efficiency.description: Real results in less time: high intensity fires up your metabolism. Fewer hours, more impact.

variety.title: Goodbye monotony
variety.description: A different WOD every day mixing weights, cardio and gymnastics. Never bored, always challenged.

strength.title: Strength for life
strength.description: Squat, carry, push, jump: you build a strong, agile, resilient body for real life.

tribe.title: The power of the tribe
tribe.description: You train with people who back your process. Here you compete with yourself, never against others.

contact.title:
Become part of

this family
contact.description: Message us on WhatsApp and book your trial class. No experience needed — every class adapts to your level.

whatsapp.trial: Hi BOX33! I'd like to book my free trial class.
whatsapp.catalog: Hi BOX33! I'm looking for a garment, can you help me?
whatsapp.product: Hi BOX33! I'm interested in: {name} ({tag}{price}). What sizes are available?
whatsapp.productOrder: Hi BOX33! I want to order: {name} ({tag}{size}{price}). Is it available?
whatsapp.productRestock: Hi BOX33! I saw that {name} is sold out. Can you let me know when it's back?

store.title: The Rack
store.subtitle: Imported sportswear. Pay online or order via WhatsApp and pick up at the box.
store.emptyDescription: We couldn't find items for that search. Try another word or ask us directly.

detail.description: Imported garment, limited units. Pay online and pick it up at the box, or confirm size and availability via WhatsApp.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.pickupNote: You pay online with Wompi (card, PSE, Nequi) and pick up your order at the box.
checkout.unavailable: Online payment is unavailable right now. Order via WhatsApp and we'll sort everything out there.
checkout.waFallbackMessage: Hi BOX33! I want to order: {items}. How do we arrange payment?

errors.failed: We couldn't create the payment. Try again or order via WhatsApp.

result.approvedDescription: Your order is registered. We'll contact you on WhatsApp to arrange pickup at the box. 💪
result.pendingDescription: Wompi is confirming your transaction. This page refreshes automatically.
result.declinedDescription: Your payment wasn't approved. You can try again or order via WhatsApp.
result.expiredDescription: The payment session expired. Go back to the store and try again.

login.title: Coach panel
login.subtitle: Sign in to update the site, the board and the store.

overview.title: Overview
overview.noOrders: No orders yet. When someone pays in the store with Wompi, it shows up here.
overview.noLeads: No pre-registrations yet. When someone leaves their info on the homepage, it's logged here.

wod.title: The board
wod.subtitle: What you write here is published as-is in the "Today's WOD" section.
wod.preview: This is how it looks on the site

challenge.title: Weekly challenge
challenge.subtitle: Change it every Monday. It shows in the site's "Challenge of the week" section.
challenge.preview: This is how it looks on the site

podium.title: Podium of the month
podium.subtitle: Recognize those who trained the most. Upload a photo for each place.
podium.mentionsHelp: Separate each person with a comma and use · between name and achievement. E.g.: Juan S. · 18 WODs, Sara P. · +12 kg clean

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Update each plan. It reflects instantly in the site's "Pick your plan" section.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Separate times with commas. The site board updates instantly.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Set the price and mark sold out — the store updates instantly.
inventory.priceHelp: Leave empty to show "Ask for price" (WhatsApp orders only)
inventory.deleteConfirm: Delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Purchases paid with Wompi in the store.

leads.title: Pre-registrations
leads.subtitle: People who left their info in the homepage form.
leads.name: Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Every WhatsApp button on the site uses this number.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.
